headlines.title: Trump faces GOP resistance on compensation fund, ballroom money
headlines.description: GOP senators abandoned a planned vote on a proposed $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund that would compensate Trump allies who say they were unfairly prosecuted by the Biden administration. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Watch highlights from Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' finale
headlines.description: Watch highlights of the star-studded sendoff as Stephen Colbert brings the curtain down on 33 years of “The Late Show,” with legends like Jon Stewart, Paul McCartney, Bryan Cranston, and many surprises.

headlines.title: NASCAR star Kyle Busch dead at age 41
headlines.description: He was among the most winning drivers in NASCAR history and now the sudden death of Kyle Busch has left the racing world stunned. NBC News’ Sam Brock reports on what both NASCAR and Busch’s family have revealed about his death.

headlines.title: Pressure on DNC Chair Ken Martin builds amid questions over how he handled the 2024 autopsy
headlines.description: The Democratic National Committee plunged into a fresh round of chaos Thursday after Chair Ken Martin was forced to release an autopsy report he commissioned about the failed 2024 presidential campaign

headlines.title: GLP-1 drugs may reduce the risk of cancer progressing, study suggests
headlines.description: GLP-1 drugs may be linked to a lower risk of cancer progression, according to new research that will be presented next week at the American Society of Clinical Oncology’s annual meeting.

headlines.title: Suicides in ICE detention centers rise in past year as NBC News obtains 911 calls
headlines.description: NBC News analyzed more than a thousand 911 calls from ICE facilities across the country showing a rise in self-harm and suicides. Homeland Security says it's simply because there are more people detained, something experts push back on. Julia Ainsley reports.

headlines.title: Healthcare CEO apologizes for coverage problems
headlines.description: Two weeks after NBC News reported on coverage issues being had by beneficiaries of TriWest Healthcare Alliance, the company’s CEO has released a letter apologizing to the healthcare administrator’s 4.2 million beneficiaries. NBC News’ Erin McLaughlin reports in our series “The Cost of Denial.”

headlines.title: DOJ reveals criminal charges over $90 million in alleged Medicaid fraud in Minnesota
headlines.description: The Justice Department revealed criminal charges against 15 defendants over an alleged $90 million in Medicaid fraud in Minnesota. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports.

headlines.title: SpaceX launches prototype of Starship rocket in crucial test flight
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as SpaceX launches the twelfth test flight of Starship. The company claims the third-generation prototype, dubbed V3, is larger, more powerful and a step closer to being fully reusable. The rocket is scheduled to liftoff from SpaceX's StarBase in Brownsville, Texas.

headlines.title: Family says suspect in San Diego mosque shooting was influenced by hateful content online
headlines.description: The family of one of the suspects in a deadly shooting at a San Diego mosque this week said his exposure to hateful and extremist content online “contributed to his descent into radicalized ideologies and violent beliefs.”The Vazquez family apologized for the actions Caleb Vazquez is accused of, which they said there was no excuse for, and spoke out against online spaces that “normalize hatred” in a statement provided to NBC San Diego by the family’s attorney

headlines.title: Pressure on DNC Chair Ken Martin builds amid questions over how he handled the 2024 autopsy
headlines.description: The Democratic National Committee plunged into a fresh round of chaos Thursday after Chair Ken Martin was forced to release an autopsy report he commissioned about the failed 2024 presidential campaign

headlines.title: Trump says he’ll ‘try’ to attend son’s wedding this weekend but it’s ‘not good timing’
headlines.description: The president said that due to the Iran war and “other things,” he wasn’t sure if he’d be attending the nuptials of Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson this weekend.
